description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: linting and tests. The linting job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.11, installs dependencies, and performs linting checks with tox. The tests job depends on linting, runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.8 to 3.11, installs dependencies, and runs tests with tox, reporting coverage to Coveralls only for the latest Python version.
